task: GTFS route, stop and travel-time benchmark

source.name: GTFS-Madrid-Bench
notes: The fixture uses GTFS-like field names but does not include an operational Madrid transit feed.
Stop names and coordinates are illustrative and only support reproducible validation flows.
The fixture is local and stable; it is not refreshed automatically during validation runs.

assetPublication.description: Synthetic GTFS-like mini fixture used to bootstrap the mobility validation flow in AI Model Hub.

selection.objective: Small, non-sensitive and reproducible subset for Phase 3 bootstrap and MH-MOB-01 scaffolding.
notes: The sample preserves the minimum GTFS join keys required by the validation plan.
Expected outputs focus on route sequence and travel-time checks.
This first slice prepares publication and benchmarking; it does not execute a mobility model yet.
